title: Sildur's Basic Shaders
description: Return of an old time favorite! Lightweight and Fast! Reworked and ported from enhanced default.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N1BIOvQX/images/69bc94c511a4b983efba33c6674b71dad7638469.png) # Sildur's Basic Shaders [Official Website & Changelogs](https://sildurs-shaders.github.io/) | [Patreon Support](https://www.patreon.com/Sildur) [Vibrant Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/sildurs-vibrant-shaders) | [Enhanced Default](https://modrinth.com/shader/sildurs-enhanced-default-shaders) ### About: Return of the basic shaders! First started in like 2013. It is a very lightweight and fast shaderpack, featuring lots of customization. It supports the following options: TAA (antialiasing), Sharpening (used with TAA), SSAO (ambient occlusion), Celshading, Colorboost, Crossprocess (color filter), Custom emissive lightmaps, Custom sun/moon angle, Tonemapping, Depth of Field, Motionblur, Bump and Parallax mapping and everything wavy. There are also 5 presets available in the ingame options: Very Fast, Fast, Fast+MB, Fast+DoF and Fancy. ### Compatibility: * Support for **Distant Horizons** and **Voxy** * **Minecraft Versions:** 1.7.10 up to the latest release * **Supports:** Iris and OptiFine --- ### How to Install via Iris: 1. Download and run the [Iris Installer](https://irisshaders.dev). 2. Select **"Iris and Sodium"**, choose your Minecraft version, and install. 3. Open the Minecraft Launcher and select the new Iris profile. 4. Launch the game, go to **Options** -> **Video Settings** -> **Shader Packs**. 5. Click **"Open Shader Pack Folder"** and drop the Sildur's Shaders .zip file inside. 6. Select the pack from the in-game list.
### How to Install via OptiFine: 1. Download and run the official [OptiFine](https://optifine.net) jar file to create an OptiFine profile. 2. Open the Minecraft Launcher and select the new OptiFine profile. 3. Launch the game, go to **Options** -> **Video Settings** -> **Shaders**. 4. Click **"Shaders Folder"** at the bottom of the screen. 5. Drop the Sildur's Shaders .zip file inside and select it in-game.
--- **Permissions:** You are not allowed to edit, copy code, or redistribute this shaderpack under a different name or claim it as yours. **Modpack Policy:** Permission is not required for modpacks hosted on CurseForge or Modrinth. You may freely add this shaderpack as long as you use the platform's built-in system. Do not bundle or re-host the raw .zip file inside your project download. --- ### Socials & Support: * [Discord](https://discord.gg/EbsAecrVXg) * [Twitter](https://x.com/SildurFX) * [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100063771121307#) * [Nexusmods](https://www.nexusmods.com/profile/SildurFX/mods) * [PayPal](https://www.paypal.com/donate?token=_2027BoQI-5DqpHvI-Du7HX8MHdXJ5_vQ05_Owto9XiM8x3j76yxS1nevrBbpn5UV2yJfymQNmTsMPw6&locale.x=US)
